name: Large Rectangular Kids' Fabric Kids' Storage Bin - Pillowfort™
description: Add a colorful organization space to your kid's room with this Large Rectangular Fabric Storage Bin from Pillowfort™. Designed with fabric in a rectangular shape, this lidded storage bin is covered with a colorful polka-dot pattern on a white background to help keep their decor looking beautiful and unique. The side holes provide an airy feel while the handles make it easy to lift and move around spaces. Large enough to keep their toys stored away, this polka-dot print storage box blends well with their room decor.
